docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-01-2025 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-01-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-01-2025 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAWN PAYNE. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF MAHMOUD MOHAMED IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CHEF ACTION, INC. IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED (D506)
